final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial watercolor illustration of a European town on a summer afternoon.

Style/medium: watercolor illustration, light and airy brushwork, fluid color blending, artistic and literary atmosphere
Composition: eye-level street view focusing on a corner bookstore as central subject, surrounding café and street scene as supporting elements
Subject: small corner bookstore with display window full of colorful books, potted geraniums with bright red blooms at entrance; adjacent café with outdoor seating where relaxed customers read newspapers or chat quietly, coffee cups and croissants on tables
Scene/backdrop: ancient cobblestone street, historic buildings with varied facades in cream yellow, peach orange, and pale blue; clear azure sky with fluffy white clouds, summer afternoon setting
Lighting/mood: bright warm sunlight casting crisp shadows, cheerful and leisurely mood, dappled light on street and buildings
Color palette: warm cream yellow, peach orange, pale blue building facades; vibrant red geranium blooms as focal accent; azure sky with white clouds; natural watercolor washes with soft edges
Materials/textures: visible watercolor paper texture, fluid pigment blooms, wet-on-wet blending for sky and shadows, dry brush details for architectural elements
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, digital smooth gradients, harsh outlines, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition, generic stock illustration style
